sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to see (have seen) together with others
2. to see (have seen) in one's mind, with oneself

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4862 and G1492; to see completely; used (like its primary) only in two past tenses, respectively meaning to understand or become aware, and to be conscious or (clandestinely) informed of: - consider, know, be privy, be ware of.
